raw_text: N. Bhuvaneswary, B. Gowtham Reddy, K. Praveen Kumar Reddy, M. Vishnu Vardhan, K. Jagadeesh Kumar, and M. Anudeep Venkat Reddy, "Quadcopter with Fuzzy Logic based Self-Tuning PID Controller," in 5th In

paper_info.title: Quadcopter with Fuzzy Logic based Self-Tuning PID Controller
paper_info.venue: International Conference Trends Material Science and Inventive Materials
paper_info.abstract: This paper presents a fuzzy logic-based self-tuning PID controller for real-time adaptive PID parameter tuning in dynamic flight conditions. Quadcopters need adaptive and precise control for stable flight under changing conditions like wind turbulence and changing payloads. Conventional Proportional
